ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "ms_subclass" INTEGER /* MSSubClass of the property sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., WD for Warranty Deed) */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of sale (e.g., Normal, Abnorml) */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month of sale */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year of sale */,
  "sale_commission" REAL /* Commission earned from the sale */,
  "sale_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales agent */,
  "sale_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_office_id") REFERENCES offices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the office the agent belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the office is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property being valued */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date the valuation was performed */,
  "valuation_amount" REAL /* Valuation amount of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sale record
Type of sale (e.g., WD for Warranty Deed)
Unique identifier for the sales agent
Unique identifier for the sales office
Unique identifier for the office the agent belongs to
City where the office is located
State where the office is located
Unique identifier for each valuation record
Unique identifier for the property being valued
City where the neighborhood is located
State where the neighborhood is located
